RulesModal.title: Welcome to the «Destiny Lines» website!
RulesModal.text: Rules and information for site guests:
list: The service is for entertainment purposes only.
Our site includes three areas: numerology, chiromancy, and Tarot cards.
We offer a free basic version and a paid extended version.
When you purchase an extended version, you get the opportunity to download the result in PDF format.
All texts and forecasts are generated by artificial intelligence for informational and entertainment purposes.
We do not store your data: all entered and generated information is deleted when the page is closed.
The administration is not responsible for the interpretation and use of the generated information.

button1.title: Numerology
button1.description: It is an ancient system of beliefs about the hidden connection between numbers and a person's character and destiny. Analyzing your date of birth and name helps reveal your strengths, innate talents, and main life tasks.

button2.title: Chiromancy
button2.description: It is one of the oldest systems of divination and analysis of individual characteristics of a person, his character traits and future events. Studying the lines, hills and shape of the palm allows you to reveal your inner potential, learn about hidden opportunities and key stages of your life path.

button3.title: Tarot
button3.description: It is a wise system of divination and deep analysis using a deck of 78 special cards to work with the subconscious. The symbols on the cards help to look into the future, find accurate answers to complex questions, and also better understand the hidden causes of current life events.

PhotoGrid.title: Palm lines are a map of your destiny. Find out what is foretold.
PhotoGrid.text1: ✔️ Left Palm (Passive): Take a photo of your open left palm. It reveals your potential and innate, hidden talents.
PhotoGrid.text2: ✔️ Right Palm (Active): Take a photo of your open right palm. It reflects your real actions, present and future.
PhotoGrid.text3: ✔️ Quality: The shot must be clear, with good lighting, so that all lines and small features are clearly visible.

ImageUpload.alert1: File too large! Maximum size 5 MB.

analysisResult.title: Your express analysis:
analysisResult.full_analysis_text: Get a deep personal palm analysis: detailed psychological portrait, life trends, strengths, hidden potential and personal recommendations.

Numerology.title: The numbers of your birth are the code of your destiny. Unlock the secrets of your potential.
Numerology.text1: ❗   Enter your full details exactly as they appear in official documents (passport). In numerology, each letter has its own numerical value, so accuracy is important for calculating your personality card.
Numerology.text2: ❗ Enter the exact day, month, and year of your birth. These numbers form the Main Life Path Number and determine your hidden talents and life cycles.

NumerologyForm.name: Name
NumerologyForm.nameText: The number of the name determines your personal goals, leading character traits and ways of self-expression.
NumerologyForm.lastNameText: The number of the surname conveys the energy of the family, the traditions laid down and the basic life support.
NumerologyForm.dayText: Determines the number of your character and the primary vibrations of the personality.
NumerologyForm.monthText: Determines the number of your character and the primary vibrations of the personality.
NumerologyForm.yearText: Determines the number of your character and the primary vibrations of the personality.

ResultDisplayNumerology.title: Your express analysis:
ResultDisplayNumerology.full_analysis_text: You will receive a complete numerological analysis: calculation of the life matrix, analysis of life cycles, hidden talents, strengths of character and personal recommendations.

ResultDisplayChiromancy.title: Your express analysis:
ResultDisplayChiromancy.full_analysis_text: You will receive a deep palm analysis: detailed psychological portrait, life trends, strengths, hidden potential and personal recommendations.

ResultDisplayTarot.title: Your express analysis:
ResultDisplayTarot.full_analysis_text: You will receive a detailed Tarot spread analysis: interpretation of the cards, analysis of hidden processes, trends in the development of the situation and practical recommendations.

Tarot.title: Ancient Tarot symbols — a mirror of your soul. Uncover the secrets of your future.
Tarot.rule1: ✔️ Formulate a clear question in your mind before starting to choose.
Tarot.rule2: ✔️ Trust your intuition and choose the cards that draw your attention.
Tarot.rule3: ✔️ Take a deep breath and do not rush to choose cards.
